description: Product Hunt is a community platform for discovering, launching, and discussing new technology products. It organizes launches, rankings, product pages, reviews, and community interactions such as votes and comments.
summary: Product Hunt exposes a GraphQL API at `https://api.producthunt.com/v2/api/graphql` authenticated by bearer tokens (OAuth app tokens or a dashboard-issued developer token), plus a public MCP server at `https://www.producthunt.com/mcp/xAOyN0Bd`.
